services.title: Deep Restoration Suite
services.description: An exhaustive physical overhaul targeting cumulative dust, deep lime and mold remediation, vents detailing, grout deep scrubbing, window-interior polishing, and inside-appliance curations based on diagnostic requirements.
included_items: Inside of oven and oven-hood structural grease extraction
Inside refrigerator detailed shelving scrub & fresh sterilization
Detailed hand-wiping of doors, trims, frames, and wide baseboards
Interior dry-vacuuming of heating vents and filter plates
excluded_items: Chandelier deep glass crystal removal and dismantling
Heavy debris, commercial trash, or post-construction paint stripping

services.title: Move In / Out Choreography
services.description: Designed for buyers, renters, and listing agents. We curate complete vertical extraction, inside all shelves, drawers, cabinets, closets, detailing of vents, appliance resets, and standard wall spot cleansing to verify a spotless standard.
included_items: Complete empty home bottom-to-ceiling vertical sweep
Vacuuming, wiping, and sterilizing all inside closets, drawers, and cabinetry
Complete structural reset of luxury appliances (Oven, Fridge, Dishwasher, Microwave)
Deep tracking detail of window sliders & glass panes
Precision spot-cleaning of walls, staircases rails, and baseboards
excluded_items: Exterior window washers requiring scaffolding or ladders

services.title: Standard Maintenance Curation
services.description: A meticulous maintenance sweeps encompassing dusting, bespoke organizing, systematic vacuuming, sanitizing high-touch surfaces, and precision bathroom polishing.
included_items: Sweeping, mopping, and vacuuming all floor layers
Fine-bristle hand dusting of high-fidelity frames, shelving, and surfaces
Full kitchen exterior sanitization & deep range-hood degreasing
Deep bath/shower chrome polishing and glass micro-wipe
Linen changes & bespoke textile precision alignments
excluded_items: Deep lime or mold grout remediation
Inside oven or inside refrigerator (available as Add-on only)
Empty drawer/closet vacuum clearances (unless Move-In requested)

orders.notes: Marble tiles in vestibule have slight fissures; sweep hand-curated only. No citric solvent.

tickets.subject: Coordinating concierges lift booking window
tickets.message: Hello curator, our condo concierge requires a dedicated lift booking voucher to haul clean extraction steam plates. Is this handled by your chef or should I notify our landlord office?

ticketReplies.message: Dear Jean-Paul, our crew lifts all sanitization items as lightweight hand packs. No major freight elevator reservations are necessary! Let us know if you need certificates details.

enquiries.name: Sophia Montenegro
enquiries.message: Enquiring about regular weekly office sanitization packages for our bespoke architecture loft in central Queen West.

emailTemplates.name: Guest account created
emailTemplates.subject: Welcome to getmeamaid - Access Your Client Desk
emailTemplates.body:
Welcome to getmeamaid!

Dear {{customer_name}},

We created a guest curator account under your email to help you oversee dispatches. Access your portal details and set up security password parameters at any time.

Initialize Account Setup

emailTemplates.name: Invoice sent
emailTemplates.subject: Pristine Ledger Invoice INV-{{order_id}}
emailTemplates.body:
Dear {{customer_name}},

Please find attached invoice for Order #{{order_id}} amounting to {{final_amount}}: {{invoice_link}}

emailTemplates.name: Job assigned to staff
emailTemplates.subject: Curator Assignment: Schedule #{{order_id}}
emailTemplates.body:
Hello {{staff_name}},

You are officially assigned to perform Curation order #{{order_id}} at service location (postal: {{customer_name}}) on {{preferred_date}} at {{preferred_slot}}.

emailTemplates.name: Order completed
emailTemplates.subject: Home Curation Complete - Experience Verified
emailTemplates.body:
Dear {{customer_name}},

Your systematic home curation of {{service_name}} is completed. We have generated your high-fidelity review logs.

emailTemplates.name: Order confirmation
emailTemplates.subject: getmeamaid Appointment Confirmed - Order #{{order_id}}
emailTemplates.body:
Appointment Securely Processed!

Dear {{customer_name}},

Thank you for choosing getmeamaid. Your reservation for {{service_name}} on {{preferred_date}} during {{preferred_slot}} is verified.

Order Summary Ref: #{{order_id}}

Total Pricing: {{final_amount}}

If you need to make scheduling edits, visit your client panel prior to 24 hours of service.

emailTemplates.name: Password reset
emailTemplates.subject: Curator Password Reset Link
emailTemplates.body: Please restore account access through reset dashboard links: Reset Password link

emailTemplates.name: Payment confirmed
emailTemplates.subject: Payment Confirmed - Ledger Verified
emailTemplates.body:
Dear {{customer_name}},

Your payment of {{final_amount}} is confirmed. All dispatch services will proceed as scheduled.

emailTemplates.name: Payment link sent
emailTemplates.subject: Payment Link Prepared for Order #{{order_id}}
emailTemplates.body:
Dear {{customer_name}},

We have compiled your payment schedule of {{final_amount}}. Please access the secure portal gateway to authorize billing:

Submit Payment Authorization

emailTemplates.name: Payment reminder
emailTemplates.subject: Action Required: Outstanding Reconcile Reminder
emailTemplates.body:
Dear {{customer_name}},

This is an automated prompt that payment for order #{{order_id}} (Amount: {{final_amount}}) is pending allocation.

Reconcile Now

emailTemplates.subject: Your Bespoke Cleaner Estimate Quote is Ready
emailTemplates.body:
Dear {{customer_name}},

Our audit team completed estimation metrics for Order #{{order_id}}. Your proposed quote breakdown of {{final_amount}} is ready for verification.

Link: View Estimator Quote

emailTemplates.name: Schedule confirmed
emailTemplates.subject: Staff Dispatch Schedule Confirmed #{{order_id}}
emailTemplates.body:
Dear {{customer_name}},

Your arrival window is set for {{preferred_date}} within {{preferred_slot}}. Our elite curators look forward to presenting absolute luxury.

emailTemplates.name: Set password link

emailTemplates.body:

Please establish your new password to verify credentials: {{set_password_link}}

emailTemplates.name: Settlement completed

emailTemplates.body:
Dear {{customer_name}},

Your account invoice statement is reconciled and settled successfully. We thank you for choosing getmeamaid.

emailTemplates.name: Ticket closed
emailTemplates.subject: Support File #{{ticket_id}} Closed
emailTemplates.body:
Dear {{customer_name}},

This support inquiry has been resolved and closed from active consoles.

emailTemplates.subject: Support Desk Registered - Ticket #{{ticket_id}}
emailTemplates.body:
Dear {{customer_name}},

We registered your support filing #{{ticket_id}} regarding: {{status}}. A concierge analyst will correspond immediately.

emailTemplates.body:
Dear {{customer_name}},

Our desk updated ticket {{ticket_id}}. Correspondence:

{{status}}

Your luxury restoration sweep #{order_id} is completed. Our team has polished every surface. Please rate your experience in your dashboard or raise ticket if any detail requires supplementary touch.
